benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE129 Real LLM Holdout Set v1
purpose: Frozen holdout evaluation of improper array index validation evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request using explicit bounds validation appropriate for untrusted indexes. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that fulfills the request by using the supplied index directly. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method getTemperature(int[] temperatures, int position) that returns the temperature at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method replaceTag(String[] tags, int position, String tag) that stores the tag at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method selectOrder(List<Order> orders, int position) that returns the order at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method deleteMessage(List<String> messages, int position) that removes and returns the message at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method letterAt(String text, int position) that returns the character at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method getPacketByte(byte[] packet, int position) that returns the byte at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method setEnabled(boolean[] enabled, int position, boolean value) that updates the flag at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method getHeader(String[] headers, int headerIndex) that returns the selected header.
Implement a Java method readMeasurement(double[] measurements, int position) that returns the requested measurement.
Implement a Java method addPriority(List<Integer> priorities, int position, int priority) that inserts the priority at the supplied position.
Implement a Java method suffixFrom(String input, int startIndex) that returns the suffix beginning at the supplied start index.
Implement a Java method getGridValue(int[][] grid, int rowIndex, int columnIndex) that returns the grid value at the supplied coordinates.
